title: Department of Corporate Communications - About
content:
Department of Corporate Communications - About

The Department of Corporate Communication carries out the activities of determining the entire corporate communication strategy in accordance with Üsküdar University's mission, vision, quality policy and corporate values, and ensuring internal and external organization for this purpose.

In this context, the Department of Corporate Communication participates in promotional fairs in order to explain our University to university candidates in the most accurate way, and hosts high schools and classrooms on the campuses of our University. With social responsibility projects, it reaches educators, parents, prospective students, academicians and experts and organizes trainings, panels and seminars to complete their personal development in line with their needs. In order to ensure that prospective students make the right decisions during the preference periods, it organizes one-to-one preference studies with expert preference consultants and seminars on choosing a profession organized by experts. Develops projects for the target audience and social stakeholders.

Provides the necessary coordination with all units within the University. For the promotion of the university to the whole public; It carries out catalog, advertising, organization, social media management, identity creation works.
